title: Platform Delivery Portal
subtitle: Learning & Development Hub
description: Developed and enhanced an internal web application used by the Platform Delivery team to centralize onboarding resources and improve knowledge accessibility for teams.
problem: The team lacked a centralised hub for developers to access onboarding materials and training resources. Knowledge was siloed across email threads and SharePoint folders, causing delays for new engineers.
solution: Implemented a Learning & Development Hub within the Platform Delivery Portal with dynamic content sections, role-based access, SharePoint REST API document retrieval, and onboarding progress tracking.
impact: Streamlined new hire transitions through structured onboarding and guided cloud learning paths.
Facilitated technical knowledge transfer by connecting mentees with subject matter experts.
Enhanced team collaboration by showcasing certifications to identify and consult with internal experts.
Boosted team technical readiness by centralizing specialized training events and modules.

title: Secure Server Solution (SSS)
subtitle: End-to-End Infrastructure Orchestration
description: Architected an automated workflow to provision encrypted shared folders and DFS links, integrating ServiceNow with Ansible Tower to streamline enterprise data protection.
problem: Manual folder provisioning was slow and prone to human error, requiring disjointed hand-offs between Corporate Delivery and PAA teams for encryption and DFS link creation.
solution: Developed a hybrid automation flow using ServiceNow forms to trigger Ansible Tower playbooks, managing server-side folder creation, permission assignments, and DFS link generation.
impact: Transformed manual, multi-team hand-offs into a continuous automated workflow, significantly reducing turnaround time for folder requests.
Eliminated configuration errors in folder permissions and paths through system-driven logic and YAML playbooks.
Improved user accessibility by automating DFS link generation, removing the need for users to know specific back-end server locations.
Bridged the gap between front-end user requests and back-end infrastructure execution via enterprise-scale orchestration.

title: SSL Certificate Automation
subtitle: Cloud Security & ACM Integration
description: Developed Ansible-driven automation for the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) lifecycle to bridge internal certificate management with managed AWS (mAWS) cloud environments.
problem: Cloud-native resources required a seamless, automated connection between internal automation engines and the AWS portal to prevent manual provisioning delays.
solution: Built specialized YAML playbooks within Ansible Tower to programmatically interface with AWS ACM and integrated with ServiceNow for automated request handling.
impact: Automated the end-to-end SSL/TLS certificate lifecycle, ensuring seamless provisioning and renewal for cloud-native resources.
Integrated internal automation engines with managed AWS (mAWS) and Azure portals to support secure, hybrid-cloud security requirements.
Architected a programmatic interface using Ansible Tower and ServiceNow to deliver faster, more reliable certificate deployment.
Strengthened the organization's security posture by centralizing and standardizing automated certificate management workflows.
